name: Nectarine-Plum Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a 9-inch tart pan with removable bottom.
3. In a large bowl, beat the softened butter or margarine and brown sugar until well combined.
4. Stir in the almond extract and egg.
5. Add the flour, baking powder, and salt; mix until just blended.
6. Refrigerate the dough for about 30 minutes, or until it is easy to work with.
7. Press the dough evenly onto the bottom and up the sides of the prepared tart pan.
8. Arrange the sliced nectarine and plums on top of the dough.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
10. Allow the kuchen to cool for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
11. Brush the melted peach jam over the top of the cooled kuchen.
